name: Morphous Frangipani
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible serene hospitality system derived from a frangipani blossom: waxy cream petals, butter-yellow throat, shell-pink blush, glossy wax-green leaves, island garden air, and calm resort operations contrast.
typography: Serene English hospitality UI with elegant display guidance and Japanese typography guidance for Noto Sans JP or Yu Gothic interface text, Mincho-style guest-facing headings, compact status labels, and readable reservation tables.
layout: Hospitality dashboards, reservation workflows, 8px radii, cream petal surfaces, yellow center highlights, wax-green navigation, blush accent states, airy spacing, soft island-light shadows, and calm data-dense service screens.
